name: adore-jewellery
description: ADORE Fine Jewellery — Full-Stack E-Commerce App

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.build: npm install --prefix server && npx --prefix server prisma generate --schema=server/prisma/schema.prisma && npm install --prefix client && npm run build --prefix client
scripts.setup: npm run migrate && npm run seed
